---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

---

## 🔍 Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature address? What is the current limitation?

*Example: "It's currently hard to do X because..."*

---

## ✨ Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. Be as specific as possible.

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? If so, describe them.

---

## 📸 References / Mockups

Add any screenshots, mockups, or links to similar implementations that illustrate your idea.

---

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context or information that might be helpful.
